Homebrew Formulae

gdal

Install command:

Geospatial Data Abstraction Library

https://gdal.org/en/stable/

License: MIT

Development: Pull requests

Formula JSON API: /api/formula/gdal.json

Formula code: gdal.rb on GitHub

Bottle (binary package) installation support provided for:

macOS on
Apple Silicon		 tahoe ✅
sequoia ✅
sonoma ✅
macOS on
Intel		 sonoma ✅
Linux ARM64 ✅
x86_64 ✅

Current versions:

stable ✅ 3.13.1
head ⚡️ HEAD

Revision: 1

Depends on:

apache-arrow 24.0.0 Columnar in-memory analytics layer designed to accelerate big data
c-blosc 1.21.6 Blocking, shuffling and loss-less compression library
cfitsio 4.6.4 C access to FITS data files with optional Fortran wrappers
epsilon 0.9.2 Powerful wavelet image compressor
freexl 2.0.0 Library to extract data from Excel .xls files
geos 3.14.1 Geometry Engine
giflib 6.1.3 Library and utilities for processing GIFs
hdf5 2.1.1 File format designed to store large amounts of data
imath 3.2.2 Library of 2D and 3D vector, matrix, and math operations
jpeg-turbo 3.1.4.1 JPEG image codec that aids compression and decompression
jpeg-xl 0.11.2 New file format for still image compression
json-c 0.18 JSON parser for C
libaec 1.1.7 Adaptive Entropy Coding implementing Golomb-Rice algorithm
libarchive 3.8.7 Multi-format archive and compression library
libdeflate 1.25 Heavily optimized DEFLATE/zlib/gzip compression and decompression
libgeotiff 1.7.4 Library and tools for dealing with GeoTIFF
libheif 1.23.0 ISO/IEC 23008-12:2017 HEIF file format decoder and encoder
libkml 1.3.0 Library to parse, generate and operate on KML
liblerc 4.1.0 Esri LERC library (Limited Error Raster Compression)
libpng 1.6.58 Library for manipulating PNG images
libpq 18.4 Postgres C API library
libspatialite 5.1.0 Adds spatial SQL capabilities to SQLite
libtiff 4.7.1 TIFF library and utilities
libxml2 2.15.3 GNOME XML library
lz4 1.10.0 Extremely Fast Compression algorithm
netcdf 4.10.0 Libraries and data formats for array-oriented scientific data
numpy 2.4.6 Package for scientific computing with Python
openexr 3.4.13 High dynamic-range image file format
openjpeg 2.5.4 Library for JPEG-2000 image manipulation
openssl@3 3.6.2 Cryptography and SSL/TLS Toolkit
pcre2 10.47 Perl compatible regular expressions library with a new API
poppler 26.06.0 PDF rendering library (based on the xpdf-3.0 code base)
proj 9.8.1 Cartographic Projections Library
python@3.14 3.14.6 Interpreted, interactive, object-oriented programming language
qhull 2020.2 Computes convex hulls in n dimensions
sfcgal 2.3.0 C++ wrapper library around CGAL
sqlite 3.53.2 Command-line interface for SQLite
unixodbc 2.3.14 ODBC 3 connectivity for UNIX
webp 1.6.0 Image format providing lossless and lossy compression for web images
xerces-c 3.3.0 Validating XML parser
xz 5.8.3 General-purpose data compression with high compression ratio
zstd 1.5.7 Zstandard is a real-time compression algorithm
minizip 1.3.2 C library for zip/unzip via zLib
uriparser 1.0.2 URI parsing library (strictly RFC 3986 compliant)

Depends on when building from source:

boost 1.90.0 Collection of portable C++ source libraries
cmake 4.3.4 Cross-platform make
pkgconf 2.5.1 Package compiler and linker metadata toolkit
python-setuptools 82.0.1 Easily download, build, install, upgrade, and uninstall Python packages
swig 4.4.1 Generate scripting interfaces to C/C++ code

Conflicts with: avce00, cpl
